en_title: Shenmue Fans Get Count Binface — a Man Dressed as a Trash Can Who's Going Up Against Nigel Farage in a UK Election — to Call on Sega to Make Shenmue 4
cn_title: 垃圾桶伯爵为《莎木4》向世嘉催更
subtitle: 选举怪客来助阵

paragraphs.en: What follows is a combination of words I never thought I’d write: Count Binface has called on Sega to make Shenmue 4.
paragraphs.cn: 接下来这组词，我从未想过自己有一天会写出来：垃圾桶伯爵Count Binface呼吁世嘉制作《莎木4》。

paragraphs.en: Okay, this will need a bit of an explanation. Count Binface is a man who is famous in the UK for standing in local elections while wearing a trash can (we Brits call it a bin) on his head. He never wins; rather, his goal is to make the electoral process look ridiculous, and he's pretty good at it. Count Binface standing unceremoniously in the background while votes are read out for other candidates has a habit of making even the most sincere of politicians look more than a little silly.
paragraphs.cn: 好吧，这需要稍微解释一下。Count Binface是一名在英国颇有名气的男子，他参加地方选举时会把垃圾桶（英国人称bin）套在头上。他从未获胜；他的目标是让选举过程显得荒唐，而且做得相当成功。宣读其他候选人票数时，Count Binface总会毫无排场地站在背景里，连最严肃真诚的政客也经常被衬托得颇为滑稽。

paragraphs.en: But Count Binface is perhaps more famous now than he’s ever been, and that’s because he is the sole challenger to right-wing leader of the Reform UK party and Donald trump chum, Nigel Farage, who recently resigned as MP for Clacton, triggering a by-election in which he says he will stand. The resignation came amid allegations about his personal financing, which he continues to deny. Under increasing pressure, Farage took the high ground — or so he presumably thought — declaring that the “judges of my actions” should be his constituents.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Count Binface如今可能比以往任何时候都更出名，因为他是英国改革党右翼领袖、Donald Trump好友Nigel Farage的唯一挑战者。Farage最近辞去Clacton选区议员职务，触发补选，并称自己还会参选。辞职发生在其个人资金问题遭到指控之际，而他仍否认相关说法。面对日益增加的压力，Farage选择站上道德高地——至少他大概自认为如此——宣称自己的选民才应是「评判我行为的人」。

paragraphs.en: Enter Count Binface, aka the comedian Jon Harvey, who confirmed he will run in the Clacton by-election. His slogan: “'My appeal is that I'm not Nigel Farage.”
paragraphs.cn: 于是Count Binface登场了。这位角色由喜剧演员Jon Harvey扮演，他确认将参加Clacton补选。竞选口号是：「我的吸引力就在于我不是Nigel Farage。」

paragraphs.en: This is an election showdown for the ages, and Count Binface might actually get some votes this time, because rival parties dismissed Farage’s actions as a stunt and said they would sit out the election. So, yes, we are set for Count Binface vs Nigel Farage, winner takes all (well, Clacton).
paragraphs.cn: 这是一场足以载入史册的选举对决，而且Count Binface这次可能真能拿到一些选票，因为其他政党称Farage的行为只是作秀，并表示不会参加补选。所以没错，我们即将看到Count Binface对阵Nigel Farage，胜者拿走一切（好吧，是拿下Clacton）。

paragraphs.en: Okay. Still with me? Good. So, with Count Binface doing the rounds on super serious news programs on the BBC and the like, he’s carved out the time to issue a special message for Sega. Count Binface was commandeered by Shenmue fan group Shenmue Dojo, who used Cameo, a website where people pay celebrities for personalized video messages, to get Farage's political nemesis to issue a surprising call to action.
paragraphs.cn: 好，还跟得上吗？很好。Count Binface忙着登上BBC等机构极其严肃的新闻节目之余，还挤出时间向世嘉发出特别信息。《莎木》粉丝团体Shenmue Dojo请他出马，通过Cameo——一个让人付费请名人录制定制视频的网站——让Farage的政治克星发出令人意外的行动号召。

paragraphs.en: “Hi, Count Binface here, intergalactic space warrior and maybe the next MP for Clacton!" he says in the video.
paragraphs.cn: 他在视频中说道：「大家好，我是Count Binface，星际太空战士，也可能是Clacton下一任议员！」

paragraphs.en: “But, I have more important, pressing duties to do right now, because I need to say a galactic hello to Sega on behalf of the Shenmue fans. Now, I’m not just saying hello, Sega. I’ve got a little bone to pick with you because the fans would like to campaign for an update — from you, Sega — about Shenmue 4. Yes, they can’t leave you guys on another cliffhanger for years! Yes, I wonder whether Sega needs to be nationalized along with Adele?
paragraphs.cn: 「不过，我眼下还有更重要、更紧迫的任务，因为我要代表《莎木》粉丝向世嘉送上银河级问候。世嘉，我可不只是来打招呼的。我对你们有点意见，因为粉丝希望发起行动，请你们——世嘉——更新《莎木4》的消息。没错，你们不能让大家又在悬念结局前等上好几年！对了，我在想，世嘉是不是也该和Adele一起被国有化？

paragraphs.en: “What do you say? Shall we harness the power of the Shenmue to ensure that there is no delay with updates ever again? I’d quite like the sound of that. I’d quite like to reboot SegaWorld in London’s Trocadero, and have old Sonic the Hedgehog back in his prime. Oh, that would be wonderful.
paragraphs.cn: 「你们觉得呢？要不要发挥《莎木》的力量，确保以后更新消息永不延误？这听起来挺不错。我还很想重启伦敦Trocadero的SegaWorld，让老索尼克重回巅峰。啊，那一定太棒了。

paragraphs.en: “But hey, I digress. The point is, the Shenmue fans are amazing. Sega, you need to get your bottoms in gear, sort yourselves out, get the update done.
paragraphs.cn: 「不过，我跑题了。重点是，《莎木》粉丝非常了不起。世嘉，你们该赶紧行动、整顿好自己，把更新做出来。

paragraphs.en: “Whether you’re Sega or the Shenmue, the most important thing of course is to follow me. And when everyone comes to vote, make your votes Count!”
paragraphs.cn: 「无论你是世嘉还是《莎木》，最重要的当然都是关注我。等大家前去投票时，记得让你们的选票Count（算数）！」

paragraphs.en: 🚨 BREAKING: @CountBinface has cast his vote for Shenmue and now he has a message for @SEGA_OFFICIAL @SEGA .
paragraphs.cn: 🚨 突发：@CountBinface已经把票投给《莎木》，现在他有话要对@SEGA_OFFICIAL @SEGA说。

paragraphs.en: The campaign continues. The people have spoken. #LetsGetShenmue4 pic.twitter.com/dnBhyTCdUz
paragraphs.cn: 活动仍在继续。人民已经发声。#LetsGetShenmue4 pic.twitter.com/dnBhyTCdUz

paragraphs.en: I particularly like the drive-by request for the return of SegaWorld in Tracadero, which I used to frequent on occasion during my teen years to play arcade games. And Sonic returning to his prime? I imagine the bosses at Sega wouldn’t agree with that sentiment.
paragraphs.cn: 我尤其喜欢他顺带要求位于Trocadero的SegaWorld回归。我十几岁时偶尔会去那里玩街机。至于让索尼克重回巅峰？我猜世嘉高层不会同意这种说法。

paragraphs.en: In fact, I’d love to be a fly on the wall when the people at the top of Sega catch wind of Count Binface’s video message, if they ever do. I suspect there would be more than a few confused faces.
paragraphs.cn: 事实上，如果世嘉高层真的有一天听说Count Binface这段视频，我很想躲在现场看看他们的反应。我怀疑那里会出现不少困惑的面孔。

paragraphs.en: As for Shenmue 4, despite the power of Count Binface, it remains an unlikely project. As of now, it's unknown if a fourth major Shenmue game will ever get made, though the franchise's fans certainly hope it happens. Shenmue creator Yu Suzuki told IGN in 2023 that he wanted to create a fourth game at some point . This, Suzuki hoped at the time, would win the game a warmer reception across a wider set of platforms, after a middling response to Shenmue 3 at the game's initial launch.
paragraphs.cn: 至于《莎木4》，即便有Count Binface的力量，这个项目仍不太可能成真。目前没人知道《莎木》系列第四部正统作品是否会制作，尽管系列粉丝当然希望它能够实现。《莎木》创作者铃木裕2023年曾告诉IGN，希望有朝一日制作第四部。当时他希望新作登陆更多平台后能获得更热烈的反响，因为《莎木3》首发时的评价较为平淡。

paragraphs.en: Honestly? It all sounds like rubbish to me.
paragraphs.cn: 说真的？在我听来，这一切都是垃圾。

summary: 英国讽刺候选人「垃圾桶伯爵」Count Binface受粉丝团体Shenmue Dojo委托，录制视频呼吁世嘉公布《莎木4》消息。系列创作者铃木裕曾表示希望制作第四部，但项目目前仍无定论。
opus_summary: 英国讽刺候选人Count Binface受《莎木》粉丝委托，录制视频要求世嘉推进《莎木4》，还提议重启伦敦SegaWorld。尽管铃木裕曾表达开发意愿，第四部目前仍前景渺茫。
